quizQuestion:
私は日本に行った{___}日本語を勉強した
(When  I was in Japan, I studied Japanese.)
distractors: ところに、ところへ、ところを
pedagogicalNote: 時 = when (general); うちに = while (before change); ところ = just at the moment of; まま = as it remains; ついでに = while already doing something else; じゅう/ちゅう = throughout (all of); までに = by (deadline); 時間がたつ = time passing
